prompt:
Educational neuroscience diagram showing how EEG measures cortical dipoles.

Cross-section view of cerebral cortex showing four key concepts:

PANEL A (left side): "How a dipole forms"
- Show cortical pyramidal neurons with cell bodies in layer V and long apical dendrites pointing toward the cortical surface
- Show an excitatory post-synaptic potential (EPSP) arriving at the apical dendrite
- Mark current flow: negative charge (sink) at the dendrite, positive charge (source) at the soma
- Label the resulting current dipole with + and - signs
- Show small arrows indicating current flow direction

PANEL B (right side): "Radial vs Tangential dipoles"
- Show a cross-section of a gyrus (convex fold) and sulcus (groove)
- On the gyrus crown: a radial dipole pointing straight up toward a scalp electrode, labeled "Radial dipole - well detected"
- In the sulcus wall: a tangential dipole pointing sideways, labeled "Tangential dipole - poorly detected"
- Show a scalp electrode above with field lines reaching it from the radial dipole but not from the tangential one

Show the layers: scalp (thin), skull (thicker), CSF, cortex.
Title: "Cortical Dipoles and EEG Detection"

Clean labeled medical illustration, white background, two-panel layout.
Publication quality, suitable for a neurology textbook for medical students.

Publication quality. Medical/scientific illustration style.

BACKGROUND: Pure white (#FFFFFF)
FONT: Sans-serif (Arial or Helvetica), black (#000000)
LABELS: Clear, readable, appropriately sized (10-14pt equivalent)
LINES: Consistent weight (1-2pt), black or dark gray
COLORS: Grayscale for anatomy + single accent color palette
SCALE: Include scale bar where anatomically relevant
ASPECT: 16:9

EXCLUDE: Watermarks, signatures, artistic lighting, gradients,
    shadows, 3D rendering effects, stock photo aesthetics,
    decorative borders, clip art style, cartoon style
negative_prompt: Do not include: watermark, signature, artist name, copyright text, decorative border, ornamental frame, clip art, cartoon style, 3D render, photorealistic lighting, lens flare, bokeh, depth of field blur, vignette, film grain, noise texture, drop shadow on text, gradient backgrounds, stock photo, human hands, human faces, realistic skin texture
